assessment.note: He names missing sponsorship in priority-setting rooms instead of a decision area to own — strong growth blockage signal; also suggests mild strain around confidence/exposure. [THREAD-DEFERRED] clearer sponsorship in rooms where priorities are set.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Sponsorship picture
new_queue.name: Who is already backing your strategic work, and who is not yet there?
new_queue.description: Tests whether sponsorship exists in practice and where the support gap sits.

new_queue.label: Next commitment
new_queue.name: What is the one move you want to make before we next meet?
new_queue.description: Closes on a concrete commitment that can anchor the next conversation.
